name: The Mind Electric
description:
Mind doesn’t like snow days...

──── ☀︎•°☀︎°•☀︎ ────

Apparently it had snowed the night before and now the streets were littered with the white powder. Mind however dislikes this fact, even after forced to go outside for a bit to “get his spirits up”.

Mind, Chonny Jash, snow, Robot, Heart, Soul,
creator: SVP3RN0VA
